home.hero_sub: International Federation of Futsal and Microfutsal • FIFUSA • European Futsal Union • UEFS
home.ref_text: FIFUSA is an international organization uniting national futsal federations around the world. Founded in 1971 in São Paulo (Brazil), FIFUSA became the first global body governing the development of futsal as an independent sport.
home.hist_text: Since its foundation, FIFUSA has evolved from a Latin American initiative into a multi-level international federation represented on all continents.
home.mission_text: We believe in the power of sport as a means of international unity. Our goal is to preserve and develop futsal, microfutsal and beach game, ensuring fair, accessible and exciting competitions for everyone.
home.pres_note: Under Valery Akhumyan's leadership, FIFUSA strengthened its position in Europe, expanded its sports programme and re-registered in the Schengen area (Latvia).
home.coop_text: Since 2003, FIFUSA has been actively cooperating with the European Futsal Union (UEFS). European national teams take part in tournaments held in Latin America:
home.comp_2: Since 2011 — microfutsal and multi-game events (futsal + microfutsal)
home.comp_4: 2019 — three disciplines included in the ICAS World Games (China)

about.title: HISTORY OF FIFUSA AND UEFS
about.about_text: FIFUSA is an international organization uniting national futsal federations around the world. Founded in 1971 in São Paulo (Brazil), FIFUSA became the first global body governing the development of futsal as an independent sport.
about.goal_text: We believe in the power of sport as a means of international unity. Our mission is to preserve and develop futsal, microfutsal and beach game, ensuring fair, accessible and exciting competitions for everyone.
about.goal_slogan: FIFUSA — for united futsal, for sport without borders.
about.hist_text: Since its foundation, FIFUSA has evolved from a Latin American initiative into a multi-level international federation represented on all continents. After 2000, some countries left FIFUSA to form AMF. However, the federations of Argentina, Colombia and Brazil continue to compete under FIFUSA.
about.pres_note: Under Valery Akhumyan's leadership, FIFUSA strengthened its position in Europe, expanded its sports programme and re-registered in the Schengen area (Latvia).
about.coop_text: Since 2003, FIFUSA has been actively cooperating with the European Futsal Union (UEFS). European national teams take part in tournaments held in Latin America:
about.micro_text_1: Microfutsal began its history in 2010 in Russia. The president of the Russian Futsal Federation, Valery Nikolaevich Akhumyan, recalled the football of his childhood on a basketball court — basketball stands served as goals.
about.micro_text_2: In July 2011, the first test match took place in Moscow. The heads of the Belgian Futsal Federation were present at the presentation match. That same year, the first Russian Cup in microfutsal was held in Kostroma.
about.micro_text_3: As president of UEFS and FIFUSA, V.N. Akhumyan initiated official European and then international microfutsal competitions.
